However, if it falls below support, I should think about reducing my position and waiting it out. Also, I'll make sure to mention stop-loss levels. Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，均线附近寻求方向

当前价格68.87几乎贴近20日均线68.858，且24小时波动极窄，说明市场处于低波动整理阶段。短线多空力量接近平衡，但价格略低于盘中高点，偏向震荡偏弱。

MACD为-0.2954，动能柱位于零轴下方，反映反弹力度不足，空头优势尚未完全扭转。RSI缺失虽限制超买超卖判断，但结合均线表现，整体仍偏中性略弱。

下方支撑先看68.76的日内低点，失守后可能回撤至68.50一带；上方阻力在69.08，进一步突破才有望测试69.50附近。若放量站稳阻力，短线结构才会转强。

操作上建议以区间思路应对，68.76上方可轻仓试多，止损放在68.50下方；若跌破支撑则观望或减仓，等待MACD拐头和价格重新站上69.08后再跟进。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 68.87 with -0.17% change, tight range 68.76-69.08 indicates consolidation. Price sits near SMA20 68.858. Market structure shows sideways movement after recent volatility, lacking directional conviction. Short-term momentum is neutral-to-slightly bearish as repeated failures to break above 69 suggest supply pressure. Overall trend is range-bound with mild downside bias unless breakout occurs above resistance zone. near-term volatility remains compressed across intraday sessions.

MACD is -0.29544561, indicating weakening momentum and continued bearish pressure on short-term moves. With no RSI reading available, momentum confirmation relies heavily on MACD and price action relative to SMA20. The flat SMA20 at 68.858 suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers, reinforcing a consolidation phase. Histogram behavior implies fading upside momentum, though no strong trend reversal signal is confirmed yet.

Immediate support is located near 68.76, aligning with the lower bound of the recent intraday range, followed by stronger support around 68.50 if selling pressure increases. Resistance is concentrated at 69.08–69.10, where price has repeatedly stalled, with a breakout above opening room toward 69.50 and 70.00 psychological level. Price compression suggests an imminent directional expansion phase. Traders should monitor volume for confirmation of breakout strength.

Given the current range-bound structure, traders may consider mean-reversion strategies between 68.50 support and 69.10 resistance, with tight risk controls due to low volatility compression. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 69.10 or below 68.50 to validate directional bias. Risk management remains critical, as false breakouts are common in low-volume consolidation phases. Position sizing should remain conservative until momentum expands.
